description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled toaster with a soft green body, black base, and metallic gray top. The front features a lever, a round timer dial, and several small buttons, all arranged for easy access. The top has two wide, rectangular toast slots with rounded corners, suitable for standard bread slices. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back is plain with no visible controls or openings. The overall design is sleek, with gently curved edges and a glossy finish that gives it a modern yet classic appearance. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with some chrome or stainless steel accents.
description: A compact, retro green toaster with a black base, metallic top, and front-facing controls. Features two wide toast slots and a sleek, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth green body, black base, and a protruding lever on the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the lever, round timer dial, three small buttons, and the main control interface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0 but without the lever or controls visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, curved green surface with no visible controls or openings.
attribute_control_knobs: One round timer dial on the front left, silver with a black center and visible markings; three small round buttons to the right of the dial.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots on the top, evenly spaced with rounded corners.
